$comment: Hard-break migration map for Krateo Widget CRs (Ant Design fidelity: Phase 0 alias/prop purge + antd 6 deprecation renames). Apply to live Widget CRs in lockstep with the frontend deploy. The frontend no longer resolves any of the legacy keys/props below.

Button.backgroundColor: color (pair with variant; map brand name -> antd color)

Tabs.tabPosition: tabPlacement (antd 6 rename; values right→end, left→start; top/bottom unchanged)

actions.rest.payloadKey: REMOVED — send the request payload flat (no nesting key)

notes: resourcePlurals are derived from the antd kind via controller-gen; confirm against the CRDs produced by `npm run generate-crds` (krateoctl) before applying to a cluster.
No transitional aliases exist post-deploy — run this transform in lockstep with the frontend rollout.
antd Card.actions (footer nodes) is unrelated to the Krateo event map, which is now widgetData.widgetActions.
